name: Snappy Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Broccoli florets, cut into bite-size pieces
3 ounces Snap beans, cut into bite-size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 4 x 8 baking pan with soy oil.
3. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking pan.
5. Cover the pan and bake for 20 minutes.
